Convert birthday bot from AWS Copilot to Docker Compose architecture Major refactoring: - Migrate from AWS Copilot to Docker Compose deployment - Transform from scheduled job to continuous service with APScheduler - Add comprehensive web dashboard with 21-day birthday preview - Implement OpenAI integration for witty birthday messages - Add message history tracking to avoid fact repetition - Create responsive UI with light/dark theme support - Add Cloudflare tunnel for secure external access - Restructure to standard Python module layout - Add comprehensive test suite with fixtures and mocking - Implement CI/CD with GitHub Actions - Create deployment infrastructure with sync script - Add security scanning and code quality checks Features: - Daily birthday notifications at 7 AM Central Time - AI-generated messages with historical facts - Message preview and regeneration through web UI - LDAP validation for all birthday entries - Editable prompt template stored on filesystem - Real-time service status monitoring - Mobile-responsive Bootstrap 5 interface - UTC time storage with local timezone display
